name: registry_set_change_winevt_channelaccess
raw_query: any where (registry.path:"*\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\WINEVT\\Channels\\*" and registry.path:"*\\ChannelAccess" and (winlog.event_data.Details like~ ("*(A;;0x1;;;LA)*", "*(A;;0x1;;;SY)*", "*(A;;0x5;;;BA)*"))) and (not (process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\servicing\\TrustedInstaller.exe" or (process.executable:"C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*" and process.executable:"*\\TiWorker.exe")))
